title: Helen Bauer: Madam Good Tit
full_description: Helen Bauer: an hour about self-confidence, self-esteem and self-care — the inspirational quotes, the facemasks, the diet TV addiction, and the way a profitable wellness industry makes you feel good about never quite getting there. Bold, self-absorbed, gloriously funny, and genuinely moving on body image.
ai_summary: Helen Bauer's breakthrough hour explores the multi-billion-dollar self-care industry through the lens of a woman who loves it and sees through it simultaneously — big laughs, surprising warmth, and a comedic voice unlike anyone else doing stand-up.
